name: Elden Ring - Mohg Lord of blood
description:
You are a newly awakened Tarnished, as you step out into the lands between you are greeted by a man in a white mask. Then you wake up somewhere different and unfamiliar completely. The Mohgwyn Palace, seems you were chosen to be a bloody finger willing or not but as Mogh greets you it seems he has other plans for you.
TW: force. forceful sex. degrading. Possible r@ap. Non consent.
